description: Posts showcasing specific menu items with pricing, location details, and promotional offers to drive restaurant visitation and purchase intent.
structural_recipe: Feature a single signature dish with: (1) Item name in Arabic and English, (2) Price point clearly stated, (3) Location/branch tagged with 📌, (4) Complimentary additions or value-adds highlighted (free refills, unlimited sides), (5) Visual appetizer description, (6) Call-to-action implicit through tagged restaurant handles
why_it_works: Saudi audiences respond to transparency in pricing and value demonstration. Free or unlimited offerings create perceived premium value. Location tagging reduces friction for immediate visit planning. Arabic-English bilingual captions broaden accessibility while honoring local preference.
transplantation_caveats: Pricing sensitivity varies by region within Saudi Arabia—ensure alignment with target demographic income level
Free unlimited offerings must be sustainable and clearly communicated to avoid negative reputation if unavailable
Location tagging effectiveness depends on recognizability of mall/area names; use verified business locations
cultural_constraints: Menu items must align with halal standards (implicit expectation in Saudi F&B)
Avoid imagery that conflicts with prayer times or cultural sensitivities around food
Use respectful language in Arabic; colloquial tone acceptable but not offensive
